## [00:00 - 01:03]

I've been to other workshops and a lot of it is, you know, they hand you the PDF or the workbook and you just listen, watch the presentation slide and you listen to the speaker quarter content out to you. But this workshop, the difference is that I do get to experience more and because I experience with my body, it stays in my body, it doesn't, you know, stay on the PDF. I would say this workshop is definitely, definitely worth it. I mean, it's one thing to pay, you know, like $200,000 or $300,000, put four years and attend university, but it's another thing to be able to come here for three days and really for the three days, change the way that you communicate. I believe that if I continue working on it, using the tools that I learned in this workshop, I will get to realize my dreams of these.
